title: Attention Is All You Need
abstract: The Transformer replaces recurrence with stacked self-attention and feed-forward layers for sequence transduction.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: Sequence transduction models are commonly based on recurrent or convolutional neural networks.

sections.title: Model Architecture
sections.content: The Transformer follows an encoder-decoder architecture built entirely from attention and point-wise feed-forward layers.

sections.title: Results
sections.content: The model reaches state-of-the-art BLEU on English-to-German and English-to-French translation.

equations.latex: BLEU = BP * exp(sum_n w_n log p_n)

algorithms.name: Algorithm 1: Training Loop
algorithms.pseudocode:
for batch in train_loader:
    logits = model(batch.src, batch.tgt)
    loss = criterion(logits, batch.labels)
    loss.backward()
    optimizer.step()

algorithms.name: Algorithm 2: Greedy Decoding
algorithms.pseudocode:
tokens = [bos]
while len(tokens) < max_len:
    logits = model.decode(tokens, memory)
    tokens.append(argmax(logits[-1]))

figures.caption: The Transformer model architecture with encoder and decoder stacks.
